Sosong

System / Location · First seen 3308-04-21 · 7 mentions
EDSM ↗ Inara ↗
Active: 3308-04-21 → 3308-06-29
System Overview

Sosong is a Federation-aligned system that was one of three superpower core systems invaded by Thargoid fleets in April 3308, alongside Didio and Novas. The simultaneous attack placed over ten billion lives at risk and starports were directly struck with caustic enzyme weapons, causing hundreds of thousands of deaths.

The invasion occurred shortly after Aegis was officially disbanded, leaving Frontline Solutions to temporarily operate the former Aegis fleet with volunteer pilots. The Alliance, Empire and Federation liaised with Salvation, whose Guardian-derived superweapons had proved effective against similar incursions. Sosong's invasion exemplified the catastrophic vulnerability of human space after Aegis's dissolution and the superpowers' desperate reliance on unproven weapons and mercenary logistics to defend their core territories.

System Data
Coordinates: [73.65625, 7.71875, 18.125]
Allegiance: Empire
Government: Patronage
Security: High
Economy: Agriculture
Population: 3.8B
Controlling Faction: Imperial Enforcement Division

Mentions Timeline (7 articles)
3308-06-29
Azimuth: A Historical Perspective (Part Five)
The final instalment traced Salvation's rise from Aegis's shutdown through the Proteus Wave campaign. INRA logs in DG Canum Venaticorum revealed Dr Caleb Wycherley's identity as 'the Witch', validating Aegis's theory that Salvation and Azimuth's founder were the same person.
3308-05-23
Salvation: ‘War’s End Within Reach’
Salvation announces that the end of the Thargoid war is within reach and begins construction of next-generation superweapons.
3308-05-12
Salvation Triggers Superweapon Victory
Salvation's anti-xeno superweapons completely repel Thargoid forces from Didio, Novas, and Sosong.
3308-05-05
Allied System Receives Vital Resources
Sirius Corporation delivers vital supplies to sustain the Didio system during the ongoing Thargoid assault.
3308-04-28
Superpowers Employ Pilots to Hunt Thargoids
The superpowers offer bounties on Thargoid vessels while Salvation constructs anti-xeno superweapons.
3308-04-25
Sirius Vows to Defend Alliance
Sirius Corporation claims the Thargoid incursions prove the necessity of its strategic defence pact with the Alliance.
3308-04-21
Superpower Systems Overrun by Thargoids
Thargoid fleets invade the Didio, Novas, and Sosong systems, placing over ten billion lives at risk.
